title: The One with All the Wedding Dresses

jokes.text: Gunther offers unwanted advice: 'You don't need to fill these silences.' Character awkwardly thanks him.
jokes.setup: Rachel tries to make small talk with Gunther
jokes.punchline: Gunther bluntly tells her she doesn't need to fill silences, creating more awkwardness
jokes.explanation: Perfect Gunther moment - his blunt social awkwardness creates comedy through discomfort. Economical and character-specific.

jokes.text: Chandler creates a fake clinic: 'Quit-being-a-baby-and-leave-me-alone' clinic
jokes.setup: Ross says sleep clinics don't exist for Chandler's complaint
jokes.punchline: Chandler invents an absurdly specific clinic name and demonstrates it
jokes.explanation: Classic Chandler wit with good structure and memorable phrasing. The follow-up 'There, you just had your first class' sells it well.

jokes.text: Monica's boyfriend rolling her over to stop snoring leads to 'Oh, yeah!' suggestive reaction
jokes.setup: Monica explains practical solution to snoring problem
jokes.punchline: Her enthusiastic 'Oh, yeah!' implies sexual context
jokes.explanation: Standard innuendo joke. Gets the job done but relies on cheap double entendre rather than clever writing.

jokes.text: Monica clarifies her disbelief about Ross's engagement: 'Because it's so fast. Not because you're a loser.'
jokes.setup: Monica says she can't believe Ross is engaged
jokes.punchline: She awkwardly clarifies it's not because he's undateable
jokes.explanation: Good sibling dynamic humor. Monica's attempt to be supportive while accidentally insulting is very characteristic.

jokes.text: Joey's attempt at 'whipped' sound effect: 'Wah-pah!'
jokes.setup: Ross is doing errands for Emily, Joey calls him whipped
jokes.punchline: Joey's completely wrong sound effect for 'whipped'
jokes.explanation: Perfect Joey moment - his confident incompetence with the wrong sound effect is endearingly stupid and very character-specific.

jokes.text: Chandler demonstrates proper whip sound, Joey insists 'That's what I did'
jokes.setup: Joey made wrong whip sound, Chandler corrects him
jokes.punchline: Joey's stubborn insistence he did it right despite clear evidence
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of the previous joke. Joey's refusal to admit error is perfectly in character.

jokes.text: Chandler's frustrated response: 'You can't do anything!'
jokes.setup: Joey's continued insistence about the whip sound
jokes.punchline: Chandler's exasperated declaration about Joey's general incompetence
jokes.explanation: Solid button to the whip sound sequence. Chandler's exasperation feels earned and character-appropriate.

jokes.text: Ross patronizingly tells Rachel 'You just hang in there' about finding love
jokes.setup: Ross is being supportive about Rachel's love life
jokes.punchline: His condescending tone makes it sound like she's terminally ill
jokes.explanation: Great cringe moment. Ross's well-intentioned but patronizing tone perfectly captures his oblivious insensitivity.

jokes.text: Rachel declares her relationship with Joshua 'kind of like it's a tie' with Ross and Emily
jokes.setup: Rachel is trying to prove she's as serious with Joshua as Ross is with Emily
jokes.punchline: She frames four dates as equivalent to an engagement
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Rachel's competitive nature and self-delusion about her relationship status.

jokes.text: Rachel mutters 'You hang in there' mockingly after Ross leaves
jokes.setup: Rachel is alone after Ross's condescending advice
jokes.punchline: She sarcastically repeats his phrase back
jokes.explanation: Nice callback showing Rachel's delayed reaction to Ross's patronizing tone.

jokes.text: Monica's dark wedding observation: 'About half of these will end up getting divorced'
jokes.setup: Looking at beautiful wedding dresses
jokes.punchline: Monica immediately thinks about divorce statistics
jokes.explanation: Good dark humor that fits Monica's practical, slightly cynical personality. Nice contrast with the romantic setting.

jokes.text: Rachel fully commits to wedding dress fantasy: 'I am, aren't I?' when called beautiful bride
jokes.setup: Store employee calls Rachel a beautiful bride
jokes.punchline: Rachel completely buys into the fantasy despite not being engaged
jokes.explanation: Good cringe comedy as Rachel loses herself in the wedding fantasy. Her earnest agreement is both funny and sad.

jokes.text: Chandler's escalating snoring rage: 'You are going to a clinic! And a pajama store!'
jokes.setup: Chandler is fed up with Joey's snoring
jokes.punchline: He adds 'pajama store' as if it's equally urgent medical intervention
jokes.explanation: Great escalation with absurd addition. The pajama store feels both random and somehow logical in Chandler's sleep-deprived state.

jokes.text: Chandler explains he doesn't dance at weddings because of how he looks when dancing
jokes.setup: Joey suggests weddings are good for meeting women
jokes.punchline: Chandler's self-awareness about his terrible dancing
jokes.explanation: Standard self-deprecating Chandler humor. Works because it's consistent with his character but not particularly original.

jokes.text: Visual gag: Chandler demonstrates his terrible dancing
jokes.setup: Chandler explains he dances badly
jokes.punchline: He shows exactly how awkward his dancing is
jokes.explanation: Classic Friends physical comedy. Chandler's dancing became an iconic character trait, making this a standout visual moment.

jokes.text: Phoebe's random overshare: 'Hey, that's the day after I start menstruating!'
jokes.setup: Ross announces his wedding date in a month
jokes.punchline: Phoebe relates it to her menstrual cycle for no apparent reason
jokes.explanation: Perfect Phoebe moment - completely inappropriate oversharing delivered with total sincerity. The randomness is what makes it brilliant.

jokes.text: Rachel suggests she and Joshua aren't 'crazy enough' as relationship improvement
jokes.setup: Rachel is trying to strengthen their relationship
jokes.punchline: Her idea of improvement is being more impulsive and crazy
jokes.explanation: Good setup for Rachel's impending marriage proposal disaster. The irony is that she's about to prove exactly how crazy she can be.

jokes.text: Rachel's impulsive marriage proposal: 'What if we got married?'
jokes.setup: Rachel wants to be more spontaneous in their relationship
jokes.punchline: She immediately jumps to marriage after four dates
jokes.explanation: Excellent cringe comedy. Rachel's desperation and competitive nature with Ross leads to this perfectly awful moment.

jokes.text: Joshua's awkward rejection: 'Rachel... you're... a real... special lady'
jokes.setup: Rachel just proposed marriage after four dates
jokes.punchline: Joshua's painfully awkward attempt to let her down easy
jokes.explanation: Perfect awkward pause comedy. The halting delivery makes the rejection even more uncomfortable and funny.

jokes.text: Rachel's self-aware outburst: 'You idiot!' after Joshua leaves
jokes.setup: Rachel just sabotaged her relationship with an impulsive proposal
jokes.punchline: She immediately recognizes her own stupidity
jokes.explanation: Good button to the cringe sequence. Rachel's immediate self-awareness makes the moment both funny and relatable.

jokes.text: Chandler's pickup line at sleep clinic: 'I talk in my sleep.' 'I listen in my sleep.'
jokes.setup: Woman says she talks in her sleep
jokes.punchline: Chandler's clever response about listening in his sleep
jokes.explanation: Excellent Chandler pickup line. Clever wordplay that's both funny and actually kind of smooth. Great economy and perfect character fit.

jokes.text: Monica's meta-commentary: 'My big concern is what's real?' about properly throwing bouquet
jokes.setup: Phoebe criticizes Monica's bouquet throw technique
jokes.punchline: Monica sarcastically questions caring about realism in their fantasy game
jokes.explanation: Good self-aware humor about their ridiculous situation. Monica's sarcasm about realism while playing dress-up is nicely ironic.

jokes.text: Mutual recognition: 'We're really sad, aren't we?' 'Yeah, I think we are.'
jokes.setup: They realize they're grown women playing with wedding dresses
jokes.punchline: Honest acknowledgment of their pathetic situation
jokes.explanation: Good moment of self-awareness that makes their behavior endearing rather than just pathetic.

jokes.text: Phoebe's dress rental reveal: 'At least you didn't rent yours from a store called "It's Not Too Late."'
jokes.setup: Monica mentions this isn't even her dress
jokes.punchline: Phoebe reveals the hilariously inappropriate store name
jokes.explanation: Brilliant joke with perfect store name that works on multiple levels - desperation, last-minute decisions, and the absurdity of the whole situation.

jokes.text: Monica's continued fantasy commitment: 'I'm getting married!'
jokes.setup: They agreed to change out of the dresses
jokes.punchline: Monica is still fully committed to the wedding fantasy
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Monica's inability to let go of the fantasy even when they've acknowledged how sad it is.

jokes.text: Monica's fashion despair: 'I hate my regular clothes now'
jokes.setup: Monica is still in the wedding dress
jokes.punchline: The dress has ruined regular clothes for her
jokes.explanation: Relatable observation about how special occasion clothing ruins everyday wear. Good character specificity.

jokes.text: Chandler's deadpan explanation for getting the girl: 'Joey was unconscious.'
jokes.setup: Ross asks how Chandler got the girl instead of Joey
jokes.punchline: Chandler reveals Joey was literally unconscious
jokes.explanation: Perfect Chandler delivery with great economy. The deadpan admission makes it funnier than if he'd bragged about his charm.

jokes.text: Joey wearing anti-snoring device and claiming 'It tastes good'
jokes.setup: Joey is wearing a ridiculous anti-snoring device
jokes.punchline: He finds a positive aspect in the taste
jokes.explanation: Pure Joey logic - finding the bright side in an embarrassing medical device. Very character-specific humor.

jokes.text: Rachel's confession to Joshua's answering machine about not being crazy
jokes.setup: Rachel tried to convince Joshua she's not crazy after proposing
jokes.punchline: She only reached his answering machine, making the effort pointless
jokes.explanation: Good callback to her earlier disaster with added irony that her damage control reached nobody.

jokes.text: Ross's confusion: 'I don't know if we're going to be hungry at three' when Rachel means three people
jokes.setup: Rachel says make dinner reservations for three
jokes.punchline: Ross thinks she means 3 PM instead of three people
jokes.explanation: Standard miscommunication joke. Works but is fairly predictable and doesn't add much character insight.

jokes.text: Rachel's explanation for Joshua breakup: 'Apparently, he scares easy'
jokes.setup: Ross asks why Joshua broke up with Rachel
jokes.punchline: Rachel's massive understatement about his reaction to her marriage proposal
jokes.explanation: Great understatement humor. Rachel's casual dismissal of Joshua's perfectly reasonable reaction to her crazy proposal is both funny and shows her lack of self-awareness.

jokes.text: Rachel's declaration: 'I got my girls' when Ross offers comfort
jokes.setup: Ross is concerned about Rachel being okay after the breakup
jokes.punchline: Rachel finds comfort in her female friends rather than romantic relationships
jokes.explanation: Sweet character moment that provides emotional resolution while maintaining the show's friendship theme.

jokes.text: Phoebe's optimistic career advice: 'Maybe someday there will be' a job wearing wedding dresses
jokes.setup: Monica wishes she could wear a wedding dress to work
jokes.punchline: Phoebe's sincere belief that such a job might exist
jokes.explanation: Perfect Phoebe optimism and naivety. Her earnest encouragement about such a ridiculous career possibility is endearingly absurd.

jokes.text: Wedding dress superstition panic: 'The groom cannot see the bride' when Chandler arrives
jokes.setup: Chandler is coming to their door while they're in wedding dresses
jokes.punchline: They invoke wedding superstitions despite not being actual brides
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of their wedding fantasy with nice absurdist logic about applying real wedding rules to their pretend situation.

jokes.text: Monica's practical clarification: 'I'm not going to marry Chandler. Not after this!'
jokes.setup: They're worried about Chandler seeing them in wedding dresses
jokes.punchline: Monica treats seeing her in a dress as relationship-ending
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Monica's practical nature even in the midst of fantasy. The casual dismissal of Chandler as marriage material is funny.

jokes.text: Chandler's confused 'I do!' response when they frantically tell him not to look
jokes.setup: Monica and Phoebe are frantically telling him not to look at them
jokes.punchline: Chandler's wedding vows response to their chaotic shouting
jokes.explanation: Great misdirection joke with perfect economy. Chandler's confused 'I do' when they're yelling about wedding superstitions is brilliantly timed.

tmdb_overview: Chandler takes Joey to a sleep clinic for snoring. Monica can't stop wearing Emily's wedding dress. Rachel pressures Joshua about marriage.
